title: senecio ctenophyllus
intro: Senecio ctenophyllus, also known as Mountain Ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio ctenophyllus include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal properties to be utilized.
